name: Crooligan

abilities.name: By Your Side
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may discard a card to place itself in base contact with a unique ally within 12".

abilities.name: Coddled
abilities.text: Enemy models may not cheat fate when targeting this model if it is within 2" of another ally.

triggers.name: Pilfer
triggers.text: Target must drain a (t). If it does so, infuse a (t).

actions.name: Hide and Shriek
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action receives an additional raise if the target has an Abandoned token.
actions.effects:
Choose and apply one of the following effects, plus an additional effect for each raise, in an order of your choosing:
"Got You!": Place the target into base contact with another ally within 6".
Terrible Taunting: Target gains either a Distracted or Abandoned token.
Unsettling Laughter: An ally within 2" of this model gains a Focused token.

actions.name: Forage
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. Remove target enemy Scheme marker.
actions.effects: Draw the top card of this model's discard pile.

extraction_notes: Model limit is 3 based on 'Minion (3)' characteristic
